blocks.text: F1 2026 fires up in Melbourne — new season, clean slate
🏎️ Australian GP — F1 2026 season-opener race weekend underway in Melbourne, race Sunday
Hovland sits T37 at even par after three rounds at the Arnold Palmer Invitational — a big final-round push needed just to save the week. Berger leads at -9.
🚴 Strade Bianche — Sat 12:00, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard hunt glory on Tuscany's gravel roads
